title: The Mythical Man-Month (Book)
html:
Author:: Federick Brooks

Some of the ideas here are obsoleted in the modern software development theme (especially The Surgical Team, or the idea of having a dedicated tool builder person in the "Sharp Tools" chapter). But the rest are timeless wisdoms.

Chapters

  1. The Tar Pit
  2. The Mythical Man-Month
  3. The Surgical Team
  4. Aristocracy, Democracy, and System Design
  5. The Second-System Effect
  6. Passing the Word
  7. Why Did the Tower of Babel Fail?
  8. Calling the Shot
  9. Ten Pounds in a Five-Pound Sack
  10. The Documentary Hypothesis
  11. Plan the Throw One Away
  12. Sharp Tools
  13. The Whole and the Parts
  14. Hatching a Catastrophe
  15. The Other Face

backlinks.title: § On top of mind
backlinks.context: ...and leading people. My recent read on the subject are The Unofficial Project Manager, and The Mythical Man-Month (Book)
